triage_rows.detail: Do not jump from six seeds to the full all-session surface; widen only to the already-flagged broader-hit sessions first.
mild_override_watch remains governance-only and is not promotable into an execution sell tier.
No replay binding is authorized by the current phase-2 supervision review or widening protocol.

interpretation: V1.34K is the direction judgment after supervising the current phase-2 seed training outputs.
The branch is now mature enough to widen once, but only to the already-flagged broader-hit sessions and only with reversal/severe execution tiers under the same intraday simulator clock.
